blocked.impact: Cannot run db_query or db_photo_update operations. Workflow requires Neon DB access to SELECT legacy static candidates and UPDATE their classification flags.
blocked.next_action: Retry when DB connection is restored. Recommend reviewing Neon plan data transfer limits and considering an upgrade.

classification_context.note: The wild_legacy_orphan_review (March 22) found 15,459 records already matching legacy_static criteria (source_path NULL, content_hash NULL, thumb_url present). These records likely already have record_origin=legacy_static set from prior wild_classify_legacy_static runs.

notes: Workflow wild_classify_legacy_static could not execute. Neon DB quota exceeded prevents all DB operations. Workflow is idempotent - once DB access is restored, it can be re-run safely to confirm/update legacy_static classification.
